## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it addresses.

## Scope

- What is intentionally excluded?

## Verification

- [ ] Static analysis completed
- [ ] Automated tests added or updated
- [ ] Mobile layout reviewed
- [ ] Desktop layout reviewed
- [ ] Light theme reviewed
- [ ] Dark theme reviewed
- [ ] Large text and reduced motion considered

## Privacy and security

Explain whether this change affects personal data, household sharing, permissions, authentication, synchronization, or storage.

## Screenshots

Add before-and-after screenshots for visible interface changes. Remove all personal information first.
